issue: Path Traversal in control endpoints via unvalidated 'symbol' parameter allows arbitrary file overwrite.
fix: Sanitize 'symbol' input to allow only alphanumeric characters and ensure the path is restricted to the intended directory.

issue: Missing authentication/authorization on data-sensitive routes (vault, paper, command-center, system).
fix: Implement a global authentication dependency or use FastAPI security utilities to protect all non-public endpoints.

issue: Insecure default allows DASHBOARD_ACTION_PIN bypass if the environment variable is not set.
fix: Modify _pin_ok to return False if DASHBOARD_ACTION_PIN is not configured, enforcing a fail-closed policy.

issue: Blocking file I/O and unbounded resource consumption in vault routes can lead to event loop starvation.
fix: Switch to asynchronous file reading (e.g., aiofiles) and implement file size limits or pagination.

issue: Internal configuration disclosure via detailed error messages in money-action gate.
fix: Return generic 403 Forbidden messages and log the detailed reason for failure on the server side.
